scope: POST /api/auth/password-reset/request and POST /api/auth/password-reset/confirm route-level happy path, SMTP-like delivery payload, and concurrent token consume

behavior: Full route happy path requests a reset token, confirms it, then logs in with the new password.
SMTP-like provider route path returns delivery=email and sends resetUrl containing /password-reset/confirm?token=rawToken.
Concurrent confirm of one valid token returns exactly one 200 and one reset_token_used, with one limiter success and one limiter failure.

green.warning: Existing duplicate assignment.delete warning in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts remains unrelated.

remainingRisk: This is route-level fake/in-memory provider evidence, not live external SMTP/browser email-client evidence. Full browser traversal remains tracked separately.
